meta.title: NODDO — Digital Sales Room for Real Estate Developers
meta.description: Create an interactive real estate showroom in 1 day. Interactive facade, live inventory, qualified leads. No agency, no code, no waiting.
meta.ogDescription: Interactive real estate showroom. No agency, no code, no waiting.

hero.label: Digital showroom for developers
hero.description: Buyers don't ask for information anymore — they search for it. Give them a showroom that answers by itself: live inventory, floor plans, 360° tours, and qualified leads. Ready in 3 days, no code.

footer.tagline: The digital sales room for real estate developers who don't want to depend on agencies or wait months.
